mapper.select: select o.order_id, o.delivery_id, o.customer_id, c.name as customer_name, c.phone as customer_phone, o.total_amount, o.received_amount, o.unpaid_amount, o.remark from biz_customer_order o left join biz_customer c on o.customer_id = c.customer_id where o.delivery_id = #{deliveryId} order by o.order_id
